---
title: "My Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

# Page 1

## {.sidebar}
Filter controls or explanatory text here.

## Row {height=70%}
```{r}
#| title: "Chart 1"
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) + geom_point()
```
## Row {height=30%}
```{r}
#| title: "Chart 2"
knitr::kable(head(mtcars))
```

# Page 2
## Row {height=70%}
```{r}
#| title: "Chart 3"
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) + geom_point()
```
